sizing_rule.note: Position value derived from expected value of probability-weighted outcomes discounted by risk-free rate. Formula: C = (∑(p*a)*EXP(-R*T))/∑p, with floor at zero. Optimal f concept applied to options pricing and probability-distribution-based sizing. Author does not specify explicit optimal f fraction.

source_rule_text: Position value should be calculated as the present value of expected outcomes discounted by a risk-free rate over the time period, with any negative resultant values set to zero.
